abstract: This paper studies an e-commerce platform’s two intertwined decisions when offering marketplace analytics: the data access policy and the algorithm design.

affiliation: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
authors_full.name: Fei Long

ob.ai_reason: 核心涉及平台算法设计与数据政策
ob.tldr: 探讨电商平台在提供市场分析工具时的数据访问策略与算法设计选择，分析平台如何通过信息披露策略影响卖家竞争行为，揭示平台治理机制。

title: Data and Algorithms: Strategic Disclosure of Competitiveness on Platforms Through Marketplace Analytics
title_zh: 数据与算法：基于市场分析的平台竞争战略披露
